configurations.name: Launch RimWorld
configurations.command: powershell -NoProfile -Command "`$process = Get-Process RimWorldWin64 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 1; if (`$process) { Wait-Process -Id `$process.Id } else { `$process = Start-Process -FilePath '${workspaceFolder}\..\..\RimWorldWin64.exe' -WorkingDirectory '${workspaceFolder}\..\..' -PassThru; Wait-Process -Id `$process.Id }"
